description_long: This object is a stylized flower with a prominent pink blossom featuring multiple rounded petals, some of which are slightly overlapping and layered. The flower is suspended from two long, slender green stems that extend upward, each adorned with small, evenly spaced thorns. At the base of the blossom, two large, pointed green leaves extend outward in a symmetrical fashion, giving the flower a balanced appearance. The petals are arranged in a somewhat radial pattern, with a subtle bilateral symmetry visible from the front. The overall design is delicate, with a naturalistic color palette of pinks and greens, and the surface appears to be soft and slightly matte. The flower is likely intended to represent a decorative or ornamental plant, suitable for urban parks or landscaped areas.
description: A delicate pink flower with layered petals, suspended from two thorny green stems and flanked by two large pointed green leaves. The arrangement is symmetrical and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full blossom, both green leaves, and the two stems with thorns clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the petals and the thickness of the leaves, with one leaf partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the flower and the symmetrical spread of the leaves, with the stems and thorns visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the profile of the flower, the curvature of the petals, and the alignment of the leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial pattern with slight bilateral symmetry, overlapping at the base and forming a layered, whorled structure around the central axis.
